synopsis: In this special 150th issue of Star Wars Insider, original editor Dan Madsen recalls how the Insider began, and highlights some of the best features and interviews from the entire run. Plus, an exclusive guide to the final episodes of Star Wars: The Clone Wars and a special update on the next animated Star Wars spectacular: Star Wars Rebels, and maybe, just maybe, Episode VII The Force Awakens! We'll also be starting the first part of an exclusive look at the LEGO Star Wars phenomenon from brick to videogame to TV smash-hit, and exploring the amazing art that goes into creating Sideshow Collectibles' stunning Star Wars Mythos collection! Build your collection!
title: Insider #150
